zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Deville De Walton I於1231年出生在英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃時，他的父親Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich34歲，母親Agnes26歲。他於大約1260年與Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley在英國瓦維其可爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1312年2月6日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Deville De Walton I于1231年出生在英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃时，他的父亲Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich34岁，母亲Agnes26岁。他于大约1260年与Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley在英国瓦維其可爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1312年2月6日在英国英格兰史洛普爾可諾金 在 奧斯維斯崔享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Walton, which are named with Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala), wald ‘woodland’, wall ‘wall’, or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

History: George Walton (1741–1804) signed the Declaration of Independence. He was born in Prince Edward County, VA, whither his grandfather had emigrated from England in 1682. He moved to Savannah, GA, and became governor of GA and a prominent jurist.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Deville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a Norman baronial name from any of several places in Normandy called Néville or Neuville ‘new settlement’. It was used as a given name first in the 16th century, and with increasing regularity from the second half of the 19th to the 1930s; since then it has steadily declined in popularity.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Deville De Walton I was born in 1231, in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, his father, Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich, was 34 and his mother, Agnes, was 26. He married Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley about 1260, in Walton, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 6 February 1312, in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Deville De Walton I est né en 1231, à Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley environ 1260, à Walton, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 6 février 1312, à Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.Knockin, Shropshire, England: Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Deville De Walton I 1231 in Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich 34 und seine Mutter Agnes 26. Er hat um 1260 in Walton, Warwickshire, England Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 6. Februar 1312 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Deville De Walton I è nato il nel 1231 nel Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley circa 1260, nel Walton, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 6 febbraio 1312, nel Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Deville De Walton Iが1231年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwichは34歳，母Agnesは26歳であった。約1260年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワルトンでElizabeth De Eatenden of Shirleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1312年2月6日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアノクイン イン オスウエストリーで81歳で死去した。

ko.Knockin, Shropshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Deville De Walton I(이)가 1231년 영국 워윅실르 스트라트퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 영국 워윅실르 월턴에서 Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1312년 2월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 노킨 인 오스w스트리에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Deville De Walton I nasceu em 1231, em Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley aproximadamente 1260, em Walton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1312, em Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.Knockin, Shropshire, England: ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Deville De Walton I родился в 1231 г. в местности стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley около 1260 г. в местности валтон, варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 6 февраля 1312 г. в местности ноккин ин освестри, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Deville De Walton I nació en 1231, en Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon de Walton - Bishop of Norwich, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth De Eatenden of Shirley aproximadamente 1260, en Walton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1312, en Knockin in Oswestry, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
